note: Implemented non-blocking poll loop in new io_loop.rs module. Created IoLoopContext (shared tunnel/device/iface/sockets behind Mutex), run_poll_loop() function with 7-step iteration: UDP recv drain, tick_timers, route_inbound, iface.poll, route_outbound, UDP send, sleep based on poll_delay. Added WgDevice::with_io() constructor to wire poll loop into I/O thread. All 476 tests pass (4 new + 472 existing).
